first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the listed strengths and concerns are substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in wording, such as rephrasing a concern and elevating an existing concern into the main justification text, are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce new concepts or penalties based on the candidate's change in location.
